name: BLINK CUT
conditioned_path: rapid-cut jump-scare edits that train the finger to flinch
mechanic: A strobe of cuts flashes on screen; tap the instant the "safe" color frame appears between jump-scare frames. Each round cuts faster and adds more decoy flashes.

name: FRAME CATCH
conditioned_path: rapid-cut transition edits that hide the one perfect frame
mechanic: A montage cycles at high speed; tap when the target shape briefly matches the ghost outline. The cuts accelerate and the match window shrinks to a single frame.

name: DROP DODGE
conditioned_path: vertical falling-object videos that demand a side-step reaction
mechanic: Objects drop from the top of the feed; tap left or right to dodge the falling hazards. Speed and density ramp up until the 60-second burst ends.

name: SPIKE BLOCK
conditioned_path: threat-rush edits where something flies at the camera
mechanic: Spikes shoot in from the right edge; tap to raise your shield at the last instant. Too early and you tire; too late and the spike gets through.

name: GATE SNAP
conditioned_path: CapCut 'shape-match' transition trends that close around the subject
mechanic: A shrinking gate closes around a silhouette; tap exactly when the gate matches the outline. The gate jitters and fake silhouettes flash to bait bad taps.

name: COLOR POP
conditioned_path: fast-paced 'find the odd one out' quiz videos
mechanic: A swarm of colored dots pops on screen; tap the one target color before it vanishes. Decoy colors look almost identical and the swarm grows each round.

name: F1 START
conditioned_path: sports highlight countdowns and race-start hype edits
mechanic: Five red lights count down; tap the instant they all go out. The delay between lights-out and green is random, punishing anticipation and rewarding pure reaction.

name: LAST FRAME
conditioned_path: 'wait for it' reveal clips where the payoff lasts one frame
mechanic: A clip plays toward a final reveal; tap during the single valid frame before the video cuts to black. Fake-out endings appear to trick the eager thumb.

name: FLASH LOCK
conditioned_path: flash-warning / strobe edits that train the eye to lock on brightness
mechanic: The screen strobes white; tap when the flash hits peak brightness. Dim decoy flashes flicker before the real one, forcing the player to wait for the true peak.

name: ORB DODGE
conditioned_path: ASMR/satisfying orb and ball-physics videos turned threat
mechanic: A glowing orb rockets toward center screen; tap to sidestep left or right at the last moment. The orb telegraphs late and fake-outs spin the wrong direction.

name: DEFLECT ZONE
conditioned_path: deflection / 'catch and throw' reflex videos
mechanic: A projectile enters from the top; tap when it crosses the glowing deflection zone to bat it back. The zone shrinks and the projectile speed rises each round.

name: MARKER STOP
conditioned_path: hype-edit progress bars and countdown sweepers
mechanic: A marker sweeps back and forth across a track; tap to stop it inside the target zone. The sweep accelerates and the target zone narrows every level.

name: TWITCH MATCH
conditioned_path: fast Q&A and split-second comparison videos
mechanic: Two shapes flash side by side; tap when they match, do nothing when they differ. Decoy near-matches appear faster and faster until the round ends.

name: BEAT DODGE
conditioned_path: beat-drop edits where obstacles slam on the drop
mechanic: A beat line pulses at the bottom; tap to duck under barriers that slam down on every beat. The BPM climbs and off-beat traps force late reactions.

name: CATCH CLAW
conditioned_path: satisfying grab/catch and unboxing drop videos
mechanic: Prizes fall from above; tap to extend the claw and catch each prize at the exact catch height. Catching too high or too low drops it, and the drop speed increases.

name: RED DOT RUN
conditioned_path: red notification dots that trigger an instant tap reflex
mechanic: Red dots pop up randomly across the canvas; tap each before it disappears. Phantom grey dots flicker to bait false taps, and the spawn rate escalates.

name: SCARE RELEASE
conditioned_path: jump-scare videos that train the viewer to flinch
mechanic: Hold your thumb down during a quiet buildup; release exactly when the jump scare triggers. Release early and you chicken out; release late and the scare already got you.

name: SPLIT SORT
conditioned_path: rapid-fire 'left or right' sorting and reaction-test videos
mechanic: Shapes slide down the center; tap left or right to sort them into matching zones before they cross the deadline. The stream gets faster and shapes become more ambiguous.

name: AIM SNAP
conditioned_path: precision-tap mobile-game clips and speed-aim challenges
mechanic: A crosshair drifts across targets; tap when it perfectly centers the active target. The drift speeds up and decoy targets pop to steal the aim.

name: PULSE PARRY
conditioned_path: parry-based combat edits and 'perfect dodge' gaming moments
mechanic: An attack pulses toward you; tap on the exact beat to parry. Parry too early and you expose yourself; too late and you take the hit. Tempo escalates each round.
